contacts.name: Maria Alvarez
contacts.notes: Website redesign, phase 2. We sent draft 2 on Jun 15; Maria is reviewing with her team. She tends to give crisp, batched feedback. Decision-maker on copy; defers visual calls to us. Friendly, fast email replies.

contacts.name: Tom Becker
contacts.open_item: Send proposal: 2 landing pages + email sequence
contacts.notes: Discovery call on Jun 16 went well. Scope discussed: two landing pages and a 4-email welcome sequence. He brings decisions to a team meeting next week, so a clear one-page proposal works best. Price-sensitive but values speed.

contacts.name: Priya Nair
contacts.open_item: Decide on renewal (5 seats) before Jun 30
contacts.notes: Provides our analytics tooling. Renewal quote arrived Jun 16; current rate holds until Jun 30. We currently pay for 5 seats but likely only use 3 actively — worth reviewing before renewing.

contacts.name: Greg Olsen
contacts.open_item: Reply re: CSV export timeout on large reports
contacts.notes: Long-standing client on a support retainer. Reported a CSV export timeout on large reports; small exports work. Engineering is aware. Greg is patient and appreciates honest status updates over silence.

contacts.name: Sandra Kim
contacts.open_item: Schedule 20-min call (Wed/Thu) about a Q3 joint webinar
contacts.notes: Sends us referrals a few times a year; we reciprocate. Proposing a co-marketing webinar in Q3. Audiences overlap. Worth 20 minutes — these have led to good leads before.

contacts.name: Dave Russo
contacts.open_item: Send Q3 marketing spend topline by channel before Friday
contacts.notes: Internal teammate prepping Friday's review. Just needs the Q3 marketing spend topline by channel — quick turnaround, low effort, high goodwill.
